effects_provenance.raw: Grape Zest THCA Flower Essential / 28g Strain Profile Grape Zest THCA Flower is a vibrant hybrid that brings together juicy fruit flavor and an invigorating, uplifting high. The cultivar produces dense, deeply colored buds with an aromatic profile bursting with ripe grapes, tangy citrus, and a hint of sweet candy accented by subtle herbal undertones. Effects Grape Zest delivers an uplifting, mood-lifting experience that pairs cerebral lift with comfortable body relaxation. The high feels well-rounded and pleasant — suitable for late-afternoon use, social settings, or evening flavor-led decompression — with the kind of bright character that distinguishes flavor-led grape hybrids. Flavor & Aroma On the palate: juicy grape up front, with bright lemon-citrus through the middle and a sweet candy-herbal finish on the exhale. Smoke is smooth and unmistakably bright. The terpene profile reads grape-and-citrus — see the COA for the exact terpene breakdown of the current batch. Lab Tested — View the COA Every Grape Zest harvest is third-party tested for cannabinoid content, terpenes, residual solvents, pesticides, and heavy metals. Download the Grape Zest THCA Flower Certificate of Analysis for full test results. Tiers Explained Our three quality tiers are: Supreme — Hand-selected top-shelf buds with the densest structure, highest trichome coverage, and strongest terpene expression. Preferred — Premium-grade flower at a balanced price, using the same genetics and cultivation with a slightly broader bud selection. Essential — Our value tier, using the same strain and lab testing with smaller or more uniform buds. Federally Compliant Hemp Lit Farms Grape Zest THCA Flower is hemp-derived and federally compliant under the 2018 Farm Bill — containing less than 0.3% Δ9-THC by dry weight at harvest. Must be 21+ to purchase. Not for sale in jurisdictions where THCA flower is restricted. Explore our full THCA Flower collection for more strains. 🥚 Citrus Grape hybrid Lemon THCA Flower Lost In Translation
